message:
refactor(analytics): remove unused `json_mode` binding in run_analytics

The `json_mode` local variable was extracted from `common.json` but
never referenced anywhere in the `run_analytics` function body.  The
JSON output formatting is handled downstream by the individual
analytics subcommand implementations (run_analytics_status,
run_analytics_tokens, etc.) which receive `common` directly and can
access `common.json` themselves when needed.

Leaving the dead binding around is misleading — it suggests
run_analytics itself branches on output format, when in reality it
delegates that concern entirely.  Removing it eliminates the `unused
variable` lint and keeps the top-level dispatch function honest about
its responsibilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
